name: Saloon Doors
flavor: High Noon — the batwing doors of the saloon. Reskin of the Switch. Activate at the end of a Move to swing them open or shut.
summary: Flip the Saloon Doors token. While shut (dark side showing), sightlines through the doorway are blocked: for each shut Saloon Doors in the Territory, ALL players have 1 fewer reroll when Attacking.

effects.text: While shut, every Attack in the Territory has -1 reroll.
